invariants.statement: Exceptions must not be silently swallowed without logging or handling
invariants.rationale: Derived from medium severity finding (TRY_CATCH_SWALLOW): The catch block returns null/undefined without logging the error. This silently hides exceptions, making debugging difficult.

invariants.statement: Deprecated API: window.confirm must be addressed
invariants.rationale: Derived from medium severity finding (DEPRECATED_API_USAGE): The API 'window.confirm' is deprecated. Recommended replacement: custom confirmation UI. Using deprecated APIs creates maintenance debt and may lead to breaking changes.
